mapper.insert:
insert into scm_delivery_detail_barcode (id, delivery_id, delivery_no, delivery_detail_id, seed_num, barcode_no, create_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.deliveryId}, #{item.deliveryNo}, #{item.deliveryDetailId}, #{item.seedNum}, #{item.barcodeNo}, now())
mapper.select: select id, delivery_id as deliveryId, delivery_no as deliveryNo, delivery_detail_id as deliveryDetailId, seed_num as seedNum, barcode_no as barcodeNo, create_time as createTime from scm_delivery_detail_barcode where delivery_id = #{deliveryId} order by delivery_detail_id, seed_num
